pdfs.previewText: BACKGROUNDS TABLE OF CONTENTS Addict Amnesiac Archaeologist Barbarian Bartender Blackguard Bodyguard City Watch Clone Clone Trooper Companion Courtier Crime Lord Dathomir Witch Ex-Cultist Faction Adventurer Faction Artisan Faction Merchant Far Traveler Farmer Folk Hero Gladiator Hermit Holonet Technician Imperial Knight Independent Droid Insurgent Jensaarai Jizz Wailer Laborer Lawyer Office Worker Politician Racer Scavenger Servant Student Survivor Teacher (Un)retired Adventurer Urchin EXPANDED CONTENT | BACKGROUNDS | TABLE OF CONTENTS ADDICT You hammer down your fifth bottle of the night, do your last bit of snuff, and bid farewell to the seedy cantina barman. You stagger onto the streets and find a nearby alley in which you empty the night's contents. To many, the next morning's hangovers would be hell. To you, they're a ritual. Skill Proficiencies: Choose two from Deception, Performance, Persuasion, and Sleight of Hand Tool Proficiencies: Your choice of any gaming set, brewer's kit, or spicer's kit Languages: One of your choice Equipment: A chance cube set, a sabaac deck, 2 days field rations, a flask or belt pouch containing your addiction, a set of common clothes, a bedroll, a

pdfs.previewText: SW5E LIGHTSABER MODULAR SYSTEM — FULL PLAYER VERSION Crystal-Based Scaling Edition Crystal Scaling Rule Tier 1 Crystal → +1 damage die per Saber Tier Tier 2 Crystal → +2 damage dice per Saber Tier Tier 3 Crystal → +3 damage dice per Saber Tier Total Damage Formula: (X + C×T)dY + any bonus dice from mods or enhancements. LIGHTSABER CRYSTALS — FULL SCALING (T1, T2, T3 SEPARATED) Tier 1 Crystals Crystal Effect Blue (T1) Reroll 1 missed attack (SR). Adds +1 damage die per saber tier. Green (T1) +2 to the first Concentration check. Adds +1 damage die per saber tier. Yellow (T1) Advantage vs hidden/invisible. Adds +1 damage die per saber tier. Orange (T1) Advantage on Insight (social). Adds +1 damage die per tier. Red (T1) +10 damage (LR). Adds +1 damage die per tier. Purple (T1) Adv Insight vs Force-users. Adds +1 damage die per tier. Tier 2 Crystals Crystal Effect Blue (T2) +1d6 first hit/turn. Adds +2 damage dice per saber tier. Green (T2) +1d4 force/turn. Adds +2 damage dice per tier. Yellow (T2) +2 initiative; radiant crits. Adds +2 dice per tier. Orange (T2) +1d4 Persuasion; min 10. Adds +2 dice per tier. Red (T2) +1d6 necrotic/turn; heal 2. Adds +2 dice per tier. Purple (T2) +1d8

pdfs.previewText: SHIPYARDS OF THE GALAXY SHIPYARDS OF THE GALAXY A compendium of various links to pages, tools, and information for use with SW5e's Starships of the Galaxy. You DO NOT need to get editing access for Gsheets, you can duplicate them for your own use, under the File option in the top left. SHIPBUILDER AND SHIPYARD SHIPBUILDER AND SHIPYARD (link) SotG Shipbuilder and Shipyard Blank version of the Automated sheets used in the Shipyards to help create starships.
